subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The exalted missive bore tidings most true, inasmuch as it gave assurance of the health and well-being of that beloved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله دستخط عالی بشارتی بود حقیقی چه که مشعر بود بر صحت و سلامتی آنمحبوب
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection
